_description: People name generation templates. TODO: Full implementation. Crew, NPCs, historical figures. Names should reflect cultural origin — a person from a 'Kestari' civilization sounds different from someone raised in an 'Iron Hegemony'.
_design_notes: Names should carry cultural signal tied to civilization flavor tags
Frontier-born people might have simpler or rougher names
Station-born people might have corporate-influenced naming
Crew members recruited in different regions should sound like they come from different places
Historical figures referenced in events need consistent naming with their culture
Consider: given name pools per culture, family name pools, nickname/callsign pools for spacers
_todo: Expand with: culture-specific name pools keyed to civ flavor tags, name generation rules (given+family vs single name cultures), title/rank prefixes, NPC role-specific naming
